caption: A person's hands are seen manipulating a white and blue Topps trading card box on a black surface. The box features the text "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" and the year "2020," along with an image of a baseball player. The person uses their fingers to lift the top lid of the box, gradually opening it as the sequence progresses. In the background, there is a white wall with a logo, and a red and white baseball is visible to the left. The bottom of the frame features a large orange, black, and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS." In the lower right corner, a small inset video window shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap, who appears to be observing the process. The scene remains stationary, with the only movement being the opening of the card box.
